symbols.name: ResultPaged
symbols.summary: Represents a paged result containing a collection of values with pagination details. Implements value semantics and immutable behavior for thread-safety.

syntax.content: public readonly struct ResultPaged : IResultPaged, IResult

symbols.name: Bind(Func Values, long TotalCount)>)
symbols.summary: Creates a Result from an operation, handling any exceptions that occur.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Bind(Func Values, long TotalCount)> operation)

symbols.name: BindAsync(Func Values, long TotalCount)>>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Creates a Result from an async operation, handling any exceptions that occur.

syntax.content: public static Task> BindAsync(Func Values, long TotalCount)>> operation, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: Success(IEnumerable, long, int, int)
symbols.summary: Creates a successful paged result with the specified values and pagination details.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Success(IEnumerable values, long count = 0, int page = 1, int pageSize = 10)

symbols.name: Success(IEnumerable, string, long, int, int)
symbols.summary: Creates a successful paged result with a message.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Success(IEnumerable values, string message, long count = 0, int page = 1, int pageSize = 10)

symbols.name: Success(IEnumerable, IEnumerable, long, int, int)
symbols.summary: Creates a successful paged result with multiple messages.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Success(IEnumerable values, IEnumerable messages, long count = 0, int page = 1, int pageSize = 10)

parameters.description: The values to be contained in the failed result.

returns.description: A new failed Result{T} containing the specified value.

symbols.name: Failure(string)
symbols.summary: Creates a failed paged result with a specific error type and message.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Failure(string message) where TError : IResultError, new()

symbols.name: Failure(IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Creates a failed paged result with a specific error type and messages.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Failure(IEnumerable messages) where TError : IResultError, new()

symbols.summary: Creates a ResultPaged based on a success condition.

symbols.name: Merge(params ResultPaged[])
symbols.summary: Combines multiple Results into a single Result. The combined Result is successful only if all Results are successful.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Merge(params ResultPaged[] results)

symbols.name: ToString()
symbols.summary: Returns a compact, single-line string representation of this result, including distinct messages and errors when present.
symbols.remarks: - No newlines are included. - Messages are deduplicated (ordinal). - Errors are formatted as "[Type] Message" and deduplicated. - Sections "messages" and "errors" appear only if non-empty.

syntax.content: public override string ToString()

symbols.name: ToString(string)
symbols.summary: Builds a single-line, dense summary of this result.
symbols.remarks: - No newlines are included in the output. - Messages are deduplicated (case-sensitive, ordinal comparison). - Errors are rendered as "[Type] Message" and deduplicated. - Sections "messages" and "errors" are included only when non-empty.

syntax.content: public string ToString(string message)

parameters.description: An optional message to include. If non-empty, it is merged with the result's own messages. Duplicates are removed.

returns.description: A compact, single-line string that starts with the success/failure marker, followed by distinct messages and errors (if present). Example: Result failed ✗ | messages: First step ok; Cleanup done | errors: [ValidationError] Email is required

parameters.description: An optional message to include. If non-empty, it is merged with the result's own messages. Duplicates are removed.

returns.description: A compact, single-line string that starts with the success/failure marker, followed by distinct messages and errors (if present). Example: Result failed ✗ | messages: First step ok; Cleanup done | errors: [ValidationError] Email is required

symbols.name: CurrentPage
symbols.summary: Gets the current page number (1-based).

syntax.content: public int CurrentPage { get; }

symbols.name: TotalPages
symbols.summary: Gets the total number of pages based on total count and page size.

syntax.content: public int TotalPages { get; }

symbols.name: TotalCount
symbols.summary: Gets the total count of items across all pages.

syntax.content: public long TotalCount { get; }

symbols.name: PageSize
symbols.summary: Gets the number of items per page.

syntax.content: public int PageSize { get; }

symbols.name: HasPreviousPage
symbols.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there is a previous page available.

syntax.content: public bool HasPreviousPage { get; }

symbols.name: HasNextPage
symbols.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there is a next page available.

syntax.content: public bool HasNextPage { get; }

symbols.name: IsSuccess
symbols.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

syntax.content: public bool IsSuccess { get; }

symbols.name: IsFailure
symbols.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

syntax.content: public bool IsFailure { get; }

symbols.name: Value
symbols.summary: Gets the collection of values for the current page.

syntax.content: public IEnumerable Value { get; }

symbols.name: Messages
symbols.summary: Gets the collection of messages associated with the result.

syntax.content: public IReadOnlyList Messages { get; }
